description.en: To transfer a list of files to/from Java (and the underlying platform) aDataFlavorof this type/subtype and representation class ofjava.util.Listis used.

excerpt.es: To transfer a list of files to/from Java (and the underlying platform) aDataFlavorof this type/subtype and representation class ofjava.util.Listis used.

description.en: To transfer a reference to an arbitrary Java object reference that has no associated MIME Content-type, across aTransferableinterface WITHIN THE SAME JVM, aDataFlavorwith this type/subtype is used, with arepresentationClassequal to the type of the class/interface being passed across theTransferable.

description.en: In order to pass a live link to a Remote object via a Drag and DropACTION_LINKoperation a Mime Content Type of application/x-java-remote-object should be used, where the representation class of theDataFlavorrepresents the type of theRemoteinterface to be transferred.

description.en: A MIME Content-Type of application/x-java-serialized-object represents a graph of Java object(s) that have been made persistent.
